title: Inhabitants
description: A mob-focused mod that adds new creatures each with distinct behaviors, abilities, and interactions. All designed to fit seamlessly into vanilla gameplay.
body:
![theme](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e2046d5161f414824719f006727e0fb26a22dec.png)

Inhabitants is a comprehensive mod that enriches the world of Minecraft with new mobs. All creatures are made with attention to detail and are well integrated into the vanilla game. Here, you can find a lot to explore—from shy and cute critters to ferocious monsters to fight. Expand your gameplay with these mobs and have fun!


[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaba52b7fe5288d5dc9fefcb6fd40376286e8e5a.png)](https://discord.gg/bxASEuAq4F)
[![Requires GeckoLib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39a5a8bf8309d9e3328ec3977d5f7d184c653c4d.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
[![Curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f1f961eee3cd2b0ee7a3c39ab369b2ac1d221ae.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inhabitants)

![info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e66c7ed6286148d928eea25f43a536af97d0c2c9.png)

## Bogre

![Bogre image](https://i.imgur.com/TwBcZKz.png)

Bogres are a new species in swamp biomes. They enjoy loneliness and mostly avoid company.
Players can "tame" Bogres by giving:
- Fish
- Spider eyes
- Rotten flesh
- Poisonous potato

Depending on the ingredient, the Bogre cooks uncanny food to share. Despite its smell and look, it gives useful effects.
Bogres can carve bones! Place 3 bone blocks in front of one to get a giant bone club. It's heavy—use a potion of strength to wield it.

![border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0a911d42883381b51631d08708b3e95b749fe3f.png)

## Impaler

![Impaler image](https://i.imgur.com/jw9X62u.png)

Impalers are underground hunters below deepslate. They see players from far and can run extremely fast.
When threatened, they raise spikes. Melee damage to a spiked Impaler hurts the attacker.
Their scream concusses players, knocks them back, and blocks sound.
Defeat one to use its spikes in crossbows or dispensers for massive damage and knockback.

![border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0a911d42883381b51631d08708b3e95b749fe3f.png)

## Warped Clam

![Warped clam image](https://i.imgur.com/pAwBMhK.png)

Warped Clams live in the End. They are peaceful and immobile.
Step on a clam to launch yourself into the air—fun with Elytra!
Clams occasionally grow Ender Pearls. Use a brush on the particles to collect one. Clams need time to produce more.
Move a clam with a shovel; right-click to pick it up and place it anywhere.

In the future every update will bring new mobs to play with, so stay tuned! Join our Discord to chat with us, there you can make suggestions, report bugs or even contribute to our team.
**You are free to use this mod in your modpacks, just don't forget to credit us properly.**
Have fun with Inhabitants!
